parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "topic": "{{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.topic }}",
  "title": "{{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.title }}",
  "meta_description": "{{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.meta_description }}",
  "word_count": {{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.word_count_estimate }},
  "reading_time_minutes": {{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.reading_time_minutes }},
  "angles_researched": {{ $('Parse Draft').first().json.angles_researched }},
  "key_points": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Draft').first().json.key_points || []) }},
  "key_sources": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Draft').first().json.key_sources || []) }},
  "google_doc_url": "https://docs.google.com/document/d/{{ $('Create Google Doc').first().json.documentId }}/edit"
}

_readme.title: Day 23 — Multi-Step AI Research Agent
_readme.description: Turns any topic into a research-backed, publication-ready draft in under 2 minutes.

sample_payload.topic: The rise of AI agents in business automation

credentials_needed: OpenAI API Key (passed in payload as openai_key)
SerpAPI Key (passed in payload as serpapi_key — free tier: 100 searches/month)
Google Docs OAuth2 (add in n8n Credentials panel)
Google Sheets OAuth2 (add in n8n Credentials panel)
what_it_does: Step 1: GPT-4o-mini generates a 5-angle research plan for your topic
Step 2: SerpAPI searches Google for each angle (5 real-time web searches)
Step 3: Top 3 results per angle are extracted and aggregated
Step 4: GPT-4o-mini writes a full, structured draft using ONLY the researched facts
Step 5: Draft is saved to a new Google Doc with title + sources
Step 6: 13-column row logged to Google Sheets for your research history
Step 7: Optional Slack notification with summary + direct Doc link
